title: nephrodium conterminum var. oligocarpum
intro: Nephrodium conterminum var. oligocarpum is a rare fern species that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Nephrodium conterminum var. oligocarpum is often dried and used in teas or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
